data.name: ButtonHelp
data.value: Run openEHR AQL queries against any openEHR Clinical Data Repository.

data.name: OpenEHR.AqlError
data.value: The CDR rejected the AQL query. Verify syntax and that referenced archetypes are installed.

data.name: OpenEHR.AuthError
data.value: Authentication failed. Verify credentials in Power BI Desktop: File > Options > Data source settings.

data.name: OpenEHR.ConflictError
data.value: The CDR rejected the operation due to a conflict (HTTP 409).

data.name: OpenEHR.TimeoutError
data.value: The CDR took longer than the configured Timeout to respond.

data.name: OpenEHR.NotFoundError
data.value: The requested resource does not exist on the CDR.

data.name: OpenEHR.HttpError
data.value: The CDR returned an unexpected HTTP error. See the error details record for the response body.
